value: If you submitted this application, it means something has been sitting with you: a decision, a tension, a move you know you need to make.
Good. That is exactly where this work begins.
Amanda will personally review your submission. If it is a strong fit, you will receive a payment link, a scheduling link, and a short confirmation note outlining what to prepare.
You can expect to hear back within 48 hours.
In the meantime, take a breath. You do not have to solve this alone.
When you meet, the focus will be on the real decision - not the surface noise, not the opinions, the real thing.
You will leave knowing what to do next.
You can head back to Work With Amanda or read more about The Decision Room while you wait.
